faqs.title: FAQs
faqs.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.description: Everything you need to know about our services.

list.question: What AI tools are available on your platform?
list.answer: Our platform offers AI-powered image generation, video generation, image editing, background removal, image enhancement, object removal, image analysis, collage creation, and other creative AI tools.

list.question: Do I need design experience to use the AI tools?
list.answer: No. Our AI tools are designed for everyone. Simply enter a text prompt or upload your media, and the AI will handle the rest.

list.question: Can I generate images from text prompts?
list.answer: Yes. Describe your idea in natural language, and our AI will generate high-quality images based on your prompt.

list.question: Can I create videos using AI?
list.answer: Yes. You can generate videos from text prompts or transform existing images into engaging AI-generated videos.

list.question: Can I edit existing images with AI?
list.answer: Absolutely. Upload an image to remove objects, replace backgrounds, enhance quality, restore old photos, or apply creative edits using AI.

list.question: How does AI image analysis work?
list.answer: Our AI analyzes uploaded images to identify objects, scenes, colors, text, and other visual elements, providing detailed insights automatically.

list.question: Can I remove the background from an image?
list.answer: Yes. Our AI can automatically detect the subject and remove or replace the background with just one click.

list.question: Does the platform support collage creation?
list.answer: Yes. You can combine multiple images into beautiful AI-assisted collages using customizable layouts, spacing, and styling options.

list.question: What image formats are supported?
list.answer: We support popular image formats including JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, and other commonly used file types.

list.question: Can I improve the quality of blurry or low-resolution images?
list.answer: Yes. Our AI enhancement tools can upscale images, reduce noise, sharpen details, and improve overall image quality.

list.question: Is my uploaded content secure and private?
list.answer: Yes. We prioritize user privacy and handle uploaded files securely. Your content is processed safely and according to our privacy policy.

list.question: How long does AI image or video generation take?
list.answer: Most image generation and editing tasks are completed within seconds, while video generation may take a little longer depending on the complexity and duration.

list.question: Can I use the generated images and videos commercially?
list.answer: In most cases, yes. Commercial usage depends on your subscription plan and the applicable licensing terms for generated content.

list.question: Do the AI tools work on mobile devices?
list.answer: Yes. Our platform is fully responsive and works seamlessly on desktops, tablets, and smartphones.

list.question: What should I do if I don't get the expected results?
list.answer: Try using a more detailed prompt, upload a higher-quality image, or adjust the editing options. Small changes often produce significantly better AI-generated results.
